title: Project Telos Third-Wave Closed-Loop Demo Claims

claims.text: The BuildLang source checkout produced a ci-review policy-pinned check receipt for examples\quickstart\hello.bld, and buildc receipt verify accepted it with status passed.
claims.falsification: The receipt is missing, does not name ci-review, has status other than passed, or buildc receipt verify does not return status passed.

claims.text: The BuildLang receipt was packaged as a Telos-style proof packet that carries source refs and hashes only, then Learn generated and re-verified a prooflesson receipt from that packet.
claims.falsification: The proof packet is missing, carries source bodies, has a non-MATCH verdict, Learn prooflesson fails, or Learn reverify fails.

claims.text: Build Color is source-checkout verified as a software-side measurement lane: version 1.0.2, CLI info/convert/difference commands run, and the test suite reports 458 passed.
claims.falsification: Build Color version differs, any listed CLI command fails, the test count is not 458 passed, or the package claims physical display calibration.

claims.text: Telos measurement and display-calibration contracts are wired for this visual proof lane: measurement layers report 10 measurements with MATCH, display calibration is read-only, and the focused tests pass.
claims.falsification: Measurement layers do not report 10 measurements, display calibration allows hardware mutation, or the focused Node tests fail.

claims.text: The third-wave outreach package preserves boundaries: no Julia-replacement claim, no credential-completion claim, no physical calibration claim, and no solved-frontier-science claim.
claims.falsification: The third-wave docs make any of those overclaims or omit the command-backed evidence path.
